chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

越来越多CVC在路上

chinese_news.summary:
飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

编辑｜靖宇

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

究竟为何，Anthropic突然下线了地表最强Claude？

【导读】上线72小时，最强Claude Fable 5被一纸禁令全球下架，连Anthropic自家外籍员工都不许碰。

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

上线才3天的Clau

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

chinese_news.title: SpaceX 2万亿美元市值这一夜，回望中国商业航天十年冷暖
chinese_news.summary:
6月12日晚，SpaceX以史上最大估值完成IPO，股价冲高至176美元，截至目前市值已经突破2万亿美元。 马斯克成为历史上第一位万亿美元身价的富豪。

马斯克在得克萨斯“星际基地”（Starbase）敲钟

其实在SpaceX敲钟之前，大洋彼岸的行业水温早已接近沸腾。

过去半年，商业航天成为国内一级市场最热的赛道之一。投资人排队约见创始人，地方政府争抢项目落地，一些过去很少关注航天的基金，也开始研究火箭、卫星和星座。“头部项目现在整个市场有几

SpaceX市值破2.1万亿美元，马斯克身家达巴菲特7倍

当地时间6月12日，万众瞩目的太空探索公司SpaceX于在纳斯达克交易所完成了上市。SpaceX是有史以来规模最大的IPO，发行价定为135美元，对应市值达1.77万亿美元。该股开盘价150美元，午盘涨幅一度突破30%触及176.53美元，随后股价震荡回落收盘报160.99美元，涨幅19.22%，跻身美国市值第六大企业，总市值达到2.1万亿美元。马斯克的个人财富随之升至约1.05万亿美元，成为全球首位净资产超过万亿美元的富翁。这相当于瑞士全年GDP，根据彭博

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin reach $70,000 by end of June 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US government lift export controls on Anthropic's flagship AI models (Fable/Mythos generation) before December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Anthropic official statements or SEC filings; US State Department BIS announcements
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Current market sees export controls as permanent; but Anthropic pre-IPO share decline is temporary pain—model access reinstatement would unlock valuation re-rating; political admin changes or tech competition pressure (OpenAI, xAI) may force reversal.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr reported Anthropic fully suspended Claude 5 globally (突发！Anthropic全球停用Claude 5); Hacker News top thread (2072 score) on gov directive + open-source momentum—suggests regulatory resolve is brittle if market stakes rise.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX achieve Starship orbital refueling demonstration by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SpaceX official announcements; FAA flight test logs; Space.com/NASA reported timeline
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Former Tesla board member stated 2-of-3 moonshots needed to justify $2.2tn valuation; orbital refueling is a critical technical gate for Moon/Mars missions; if achieved, stock re-rates; if missed, downside triggered.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SpaceX IPO at $1.77tn → $2.2tn post-debut (25%+ upside already priced); small retail scramble suggests mania not fundamentals; board member's public 2-of-3 framework signals contingency re-pricing risk.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Bitcoin dominate >52% of total crypto market cap on September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap public cap rankings on settlement date
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BTC at $63k and $59k reported floor; altseason narratives (BNB ETF launch, Solana DeFi) distract from BTC dominance re-accumulation; Standard Chartered analyst called $59k the *bottom*—if true, BTC rally outpaces altcoin recovery.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Bloomberg analyst says most BTC ETF investors stayed put despite outflows (no panic selling); BTC futures positioning shows structural bid; Cointelegraph orderbook structure bullish; trending SIREN, VELVET, PENGU tokens are speculative air.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Elon Musk's net worth exceed $1.2 trillion USD on December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Musk now $1.11tn per BBC; SpaceX IPO created $90bn+ new wealth in one day; Tesla stock, xAI equity, Neuralink upside all multiplicative; market may underprice second-order SpaceX rally and Tesla rebound on reduced short interest.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: BBC: 'Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire'; SpaceX stock rallied 19% on debut alone; 36Kr noted 马斯克身家达巴菲特7倍 (Musk now 7x Buffett)—suggests momentum continuation if SpaceX / Tesla sustain.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Iran Strait of Hormuz remain open to global shipping for 90+ consecutive days following any US-Iran ceasefire agreement in 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: US Energy Information Administration (EIA) shipping data; CNBC/Reuters Hormuz transit reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: BBC headline explicit: 'Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening'; oil markets will re-price ~1–2M bpd supply surge if ceasefire holds; energy traders under-hedging binary tail (oil +15% if Hormuz threatened; -8% if confirmed open).
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump admin said deal 'likely in coming days' but not 100% certain; BBC reports finalization is 'close'; geopolitical binary with massive macro spillover to crude, shipping costs, dollar positioning.

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin dominance resumes above 52% by EOY 2026 as macro uncertainty and Fed policy divergence drive flight-to-store-of-value; altseason narrative fades.
supporting_signals: Standard Chartered analyst called $59k the bottom; orderbook structure shows trader confidence (CoinDesk)
Bloomberg analyst: most BTC ETF investors stayed put despite outflows—no capitulation, just repositioning
Trending alts (SIREN, VELVET, PENGU) are hype; no fundamental driver vs BTC's macro hedge status
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum stakers showing resilience despite bearish futures (Cointelegraph); Solana DeFi, Bittensor AI compute, and RWA narratives may extend altcoin dominance into 2027.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/USDC spot (or BTC perps with 3-5x leverage on dips to $61-62k); short altcoin basket (e.g., short SOLETH, short ETHBTC if ETH breaks below 0.045)

investment_theses.thesis: Anthropic pre-IPO equity oversold on export control headline; model re-enablement or political reversal by Q4 2026 unlocks 40%+ valuation re-rate.
supporting_signals: Anthropic disabled Fable 5/Mythos 5 to comply with US directive (CNBC, 36Kr flagged as sudden news)—but restriction is targeted, not existential
Hacker News top discussion (2072 score): open-source AI must win; implies regulatory pressure may face tech/startup backlash
Cointelegraph: pre-IPO shares fell on headline; but no fundamental product erosion—compliance move, not bankruptcy signal
investment_theses.counter_view: US government export controls may persist if China AI race escalates; Anthropic IPO delayed indefinitely; OpenAI / xAI competitors fill gap, rendering Anthropic's model reset moot.
investment_theses.expression: If access to secondary pre-IPO Anthropic shares available: accumulate on dips; or buy calls on Anthropic IPO announced date (Jan–Mar 2027 window). Hedge with short OpenAI / xAI tokens if available.

investment_theses.thesis: Iran ceasefire deal signed by June 15, 2026 re-prices oil lower (~5–8%), USD weakness (dollar index down 1–2%), and gold down ~4%; positioning now underhedges this outcome.
supporting_signals: Trump admin official: signing 'likely in coming days' but not 100% certain (CNBC)
BBC reports US, Iran, Pakistan consensus deal is 'close'—diplomatic language signals end-stage negotiations
BBC: 'Deal to end fighting would lead to Hormuz reopening'—explicit oil re-pricing trigger
investment_theses.counter_view: Deal collapses in final hours (political/parliamentary hurdles); Hormuz blockade escalates instead; oil rallies to $95+ and gold spikes; geopolitical risk premium re-inflates.
investment_theses.expression: Short crude oil (WTI futures: sell July 2026 contract, or USCI ETF); long DXY (dollar strength hedge); short GLD or gold miners (GDX); size 2–3% portfolio risk, take profits if deal announced.

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX stock consolidates in $140–160 range through Q3 2026, then rallies 20%+ into year-end on Starship orbital refueling demo (executive board hint suggests June/July 2027 gate).
investment_theses.horizon: 6–12 months (to EOY 2026, with tactical re-entry July 2027)
supporting_signals: SpaceX IPO at $135 → $176 in debut (+30%); market cap now $2.2tn—significant pop leaves little room for immediate expansion
Former Tesla board member public statement: 2-of-3 moonshots needed to justify valuation—Starship refueling, Mars architecture, lunar lander tech all material gates
36Kr noted SpaceX broke records; Chinese state media focuses on competitive threat, not valuation (suggests IPO enthusiasm is real but not irrational)
investment_theses.counter_view: SpaceX stock corrects 15–25% if Starship test delays or fails; Musk distraction (Tesla, xAI, Neuralink) reduces execution tempo; Chinese commercial space startups erode market share.
investment_theses.expression: Buy SPCXX (SpaceX stock) on pullbacks to $140–145 in June–Sept 2026; take 50% profit at $170; hold 50% for 2027 refueling demo catalyst. Avoid at $160+ into summer.

investment_theses.thesis: Fed policy uncertainty + Iran ceasefire = DXY weakness; 10Y UST yield compresses toward 3.8–4.0% by Aug 2026; Gold outperforms real assets; BTC appreciates as non-correlated hedge.
supporting_signals: Trump admin Iran deal imminent → geopolitical risk premium deflates → safe-haven demand weakens → USD index lower
CoinDesk: BTC steadied above $63k after macro rescue last week—suggests macro drivers (Fed data, risk sentiment) now dominate headlines
36Kr macro signals: Chinese AI white paper on education ROI suggests deflationary pressure (less capex = lower USD carry premium)
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed tightens unexpectedly (inflation resurge); Iran deal fails → oil shock → USD rally. DXY rises to 105+, gold falls, BTC de-rates on risk-off.
investment_theses.expression: Short DXY (currency futures or DBC bearish structure); long TLT (20Y Treasury, beta to yield compression); long BTC/USDC (macro hedge); long GLD (tail hedge). Position 2–3% portfolio, rebalance if Iran deal collapses.
